testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow navigates to create.php with table parameter
testcase.classname: navigates to create.php with table parameter

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow displays create form
testcase.classname: displays create form

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow displays submit button
testcase.classname: displays submit button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow displays cancel button
testcase.classname: displays cancel button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow cancel button returns to grid
testcase.classname: cancel button returns to grid

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow displays form fields
testcase.classname: displays form fields

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow shows CSRF token in form
testcase.classname: shows CSRF token in form

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow marks required fields
testcase.classname: marks required fields

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow handles enum fields with dropdown if present
testcase.classname: handles enum fields with dropdown if present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record Flow form respects pattern validation on inputs if present
testcase.classname: form respects pattern validation on inputs if present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow loads edit.php with record ID
testcase.classname: loads edit.php with record ID

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow displays tab navigation
testcase.classname: displays tab navigation

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow shows Details tab as default
testcase.classname: shows Details tab as default

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow displays tab buttons: Details, Comments, History
testcase.classname: displays tab buttons: Details, Comments, History

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow switches to Comments tab
testcase.classname: switches to Comments tab

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow switches to History tab
testcase.classname: switches to History tab

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow displays Save button
testcase.classname: displays Save button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow displays Cancel button
testcase.classname: displays Cancel button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow shows record ID strip
testcase.classname: shows record ID strip

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow displays form fields in Details tab
testcase.classname: displays form fields in Details tab

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record Flow Comments tab mounts comment panel
testcase.classname: Comments tab mounts comment panel

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Delete Record displays Delete button in grid row actions
testcase.classname: displays Delete button in grid row actions

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Delete Record shows delete button exists in grid row
testcase.classname: shows delete button exists in grid row

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Form Validation prevents submit with empty required fields
testcase.classname: prevents submit with empty required fields

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Form Validation shows validation for pattern inputs if present
testcase.classname: shows validation for pattern inputs if present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Form Validation form has visible submit button
testcase.classname: form has visible submit button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Subtables (if present) displays subtable containers if present
testcase.classname: displays subtable containers if present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Subtables (if present) displays Add subtable links if present
testcase.classname: displays Add subtable links if present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Subtables (if present) subtable Add link navigates to create.php
testcase.classname: subtable Add link navigates to create.php

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record: Actual Save filling first text input and submitting redirects to grid
testcase.classname: filling first text input and submitting redirects to grid

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record: Actual Save empty required field shows native validation or stays on page
testcase.classname: empty required field shows native validation or stays on page

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Create Record: Actual Save cancel button returns to grid without creating record
testcase.classname: cancel button returns to grid without creating record

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record: Actual Save changing a text field and saving redirects to grid
testcase.classname: changing a text field and saving redirects to grid

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Edit Record: Actual Save save shows success indication (toast or saved=1)
testcase.classname: save shows success indication (toast or saved=1)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Delete Record: Actual Flow cancelling delete confirm keeps record in grid
testcase.classname: cancelling delete confirm keeps record in grid

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Delete Record: Actual Flow confirming delete removes record from grid
testcase.classname: confirming delete removes record from grid

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Duplicate Record: Actual Flow clicking Duplicate fires POST to duplicate endpoint
testcase.classname: clicking Duplicate fires POST to duplicate endpoint

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Duplicate Record: Actual Flow duplicate does not decrease row count
testcase.classname: duplicate does not decrease row count

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Duplicate Record: Actual Flow duplicate adds a row on success (no unique constraint)
testcase.classname: duplicate adds a row on success (no unique constraint)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Role-Based UI editor role: Add button is visible; it navigates to create.php
testcase.classname: editor role: Add button is visible; it navigates to create.php

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Role-Based UI Export CSV visible for all roles
testcase.classname: Export CSV visible for all roles

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Role-Based UI editor role: Data Cleanup button is present
testcase.classname: editor role: Data Cleanup button is present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Role-Based UI editor role: contenteditable cells are present
testcase.classname: editor role: contenteditable cells are present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Role-Based UI UI is role-consistent: Add and Cleanup both appear for editor
testcase.classname: UI is role-consistent: Add and Cleanup both appear for editor

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Role-Based UI History tab shows audit entries or empty state on edit.php
testcase.classname: History tab shows audit entries or empty state on edit.php
